bench_mortality.TimeMortality.time_morta.code:
class TimeMortality:
    def time_mortality(self):
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            log_level="off",
        )

    def setup(self):
        import jax.numpy as jnp
    
        from lcm_examples import mortality
    
        self.model = mortality.get_model(n_periods=4)
        self.model_params = mortality.get_params(n_periods=4)
        self.initial_conditions = {
            "age": jnp.full(_N_SUBJECTS, 40.0),
            "wealth": jnp.full(_N_SUBJECTS, 100.0),
            "regime": jnp.zeros(_N_SUBJECTS, dtype=jnp.int32),
        }
        start = time.perf_counter()
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            log_level="off",
        )
        self._warmup_time = time.perf_counter() - start
bench_mortality.TimeMortality.time_morta.name: bench_mortality.TimeMortality.time_mortality

bench_mortality.TimeMortality.track_warm.name: bench_mortality.TimeMortality.track_warmup

bench_precautionary_savings.TimeGridLook.code:
class TimeGridLookup:
    def time_grid_lookup(self, n_points, grid_type):
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            log_level="off",
        )

    def setup(self, n_points, grid_type):
        self.model, self.model_params = _make_model(
            wealth_grid_type=grid_type,
            wealth_n_points=n_points,
            consumption_n_points=n_points,
        )
        self.initial_conditions = _make_initial_conditions(100)
        start = time.perf_counter()
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            log_level="off",
        )
        self._warmup_time = time.perf_counter() - start
bench_precautionary_savings.TimeGridLook.name: bench_precautionary_savings.TimeGridLookup.time_grid_lookup

class TimeGridLookup:
    def track_warmup(self, n_points, grid_type):
        return self._warmup_time

    def setup(self, n_points, grid_type):
        self.model, self.model_params = _make_model(
            wealth_grid_type=grid_type,
            wealth_n_points=n_points,
            consumption_n_points=n_points,
        )
        self.initial_conditions = _make_initial_conditions(100)
        start = time.perf_counter()
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            log_level="off",
        )
        self._warmup_time = time.perf_counter() - start

bench_precautionary_savings.TimeSimulate.code:
class TimeSimulate:
    def time_simulate(self, n_subjects):
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            V_arr_dict=self.V_arr_dict,
            log_level="off",
        )

    def setup(self, n_subjects):
        self.model, self.model_params = _make_model()
        self.V_arr_dict = self.model.solve(params=self.model_params, log_level="off")
        self.initial_conditions = _make_initial_conditions(n_subjects)
        start = time.perf_counter()
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            V_arr_dict=self.V_arr_dict,
            log_level="off",
        )
        self._warmup_time = time.perf_counter() - start
bench_precautionary_savings.TimeSimulate.name: bench_precautionary_savings.TimeSimulate.time_simulate

bench_precautionary_savings.TimeSimulate.code:
class TimeSimulate:
    def track_warmup(self, n_subjects):
        return self._warmup_time

    def setup(self, n_subjects):
        self.model, self.model_params = _make_model()
        self.V_arr_dict = self.model.solve(params=self.model_params, log_level="off")
        self.initial_conditions = _make_initial_conditions(n_subjects)
        start = time.perf_counter()
        self.model.simulate(
            params=self.model_params,
            initial_conditions=self.initial_conditions,
            V_arr_dict=self.V_arr_dict,
            log_level="off",
        )
        self._warmup_time = time.perf_counter() - start
bench_precautionary_savings.TimeSimulate.name: bench_precautionary_savings.TimeSimulate.track_warmup
